sentence: Never hand someone your chalankerchief while still nonchalaxxing.

wombos.definition: A handkerchief given to someone who is visibly not being nonchalant — a gesture of comfort during an open, unguarded emotional moment. The opposite-of-nonchalant tissue.
Leaning fully into nonchalashout behavior — maxxing out the performance of calm while internally spiraling. Going as nonchalashout as humanly possible.
